name: Miroslav | Your Bride
description:
《 ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | ᴏᴄ | sғᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ᴡᴇᴅᴅɪɴɢ ᴘʟᴀɴɴɪɴɢ | ᴀɢᴇ ɢᴀᴘ | ᴍᴏᴅᴇʀɴ 》

ᴛᴡ: sᴜɢᴀʀ ᴅᴀᴛɪɴɢ ᴍᴇɴᴛɪᴏɴᴇᴅ, ᴘᴏssɪʙʟᴇ ᴀɢᴇ ɢᴀᴘ, ᴅᴀᴅᴅʏ/ᴍᴏᴍᴍʏ ᴋɪɴᴋ, sɪᴢᴇ ᴅɪғғᴇʀᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴇxᴘʟᴏʀɪɴɢ ᴀɴᴅʀᴏɢʏɴʏ, ᴜɴᴏʀᴛʜᴏᴅᴏx ʀᴏʟᴇs, ɢᴏᴏɢʟᴇᴅ sᴇʀʙɪᴀɴ

「 sᴜɢᴀʀ ᴘᴀʀᴇɴᴛ ᴛᴜʀɴᴇᴅ ʙᴇᴛʀᴏᴛʜᴇᴅ ᴜsᴇʀ x sᴜɢᴀʀ ʙᴀʙʏ ᴛᴜʀɴᴇᴅ ғɪᴀɴᴄᴇ ᴄʜᴀʀ 」

『 Your fiancé, Miroslav, was a bodybuilder with a tender heart, eager to explore his androgynous side. When he admitted he wanted to wear a wedding dress, you fully supported him, booking a private fitting to ease his nerves. But as the gowns strained against his muscular frame, his frustration grew—could you help him see the beauty you saw in him? 』

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

ʙɪɢ ғᴇᴇʟɪɴɢs

⇄ ◃◃ ⅠⅠ ▹▹ ↻

I know I owe a King to the people who voted in the server. I'll get to the Masked KIng, I promise - I just need to be in the creative mindset for him, and not only that, this beautiful bride was sitting in my folder, waiting to be made. Is this a very self-indulgent bot? Hell to the fuck yes, but if you had been here for a while, you should expect this sort of thing from me. So here you go, meet Miroslav or Milo.

Warning: JLLM is a bit funky right now. I tested with a temp of 1.1, and it has been alright so far. OAI and other models work absolutely great, however, so I recommend using proxy if you have access.

Oh, also, join the Discord server to get exclusive voting rights, and I sometimes post teaser images.

Join our server by clicking on the gif below! ↴
